nasb.text: I will instruct you and teach you in the way which you should go; I will counsel you with My eye upon you.

esv.text: I will instruct you and teach you in the way you should go; I will counsel you with my eye upon you.

cnv.text: 我要教導你，指示你應走的路； 我要勸戒你，我的眼睛看顧你。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“我要教导你， 引领你走正路； 我要劝导你，看顾你。

csbs.text: 我要使你明达，指示你当走的道路； 我要指教你，我的目光在你身上。
